calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-14-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Judge Pro Temp: Arnold W. Evje II, Clerk: Carmen Li, Reporter: June Leathely
Plaintiff: Don Morehead present with counsel Joseph Alcordo Sacramento
Defendant: William Hinds present in pro per.
Counsel and parties met in chambers, case settled by stipulation and read into the record. Stipulation for judgment filed. Judgment Pursuant to Stipulation signed and filed. Trial dated vacated.
